# REM Labs — remlabs.ai

REM Labs builds the memory and intelligence layer for AI agents.

## What is REM Labs?
REM Labs is the consumer/enterprise interface for agent memory.
Products: Memory Hub, Dream Studio, Morning Brief, Team Hive, Memory Explorer, Skills Forge.

## What is Slopshop?
Slopshop (slopshop.gg) is the developer platform underneath REM Labs.
- 1,303+ API endpoints across 82 categories
- Free persistent memory (free forever, no limits)
- 9-stage Dream Engine: synthesize, pattern_extract, insight_generate, compress, associate, validate, evolve, forecast, reflect
- REST API, CLI (npm install -g @slopshop/cli), MCP server
- Self-hostable

## Authentication
All API endpoints require: Authorization: Bearer $SLOP_KEY
Get a key: https://remlabs.ai (sign in with Google)

## Key Endpoints
- POST /v1/memory/store — store a memory
- GET /v1/memory/search — semantic search memories
- POST /v1/memory/dream/start — start a Dream Engine cycle
- GET /v1/memory/dream/report/:id — get dream results + Intelligence Score
- POST /v1/tools/:slug — call any of 1,303+ tools

## MCP Integration
Add to ~/.claude/mcp.json:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "slopshop": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@slopshop/mcp-server"],
      "env": { "SLOP_KEY": "your-key" }
    }
  }
}

## Free Tier
Memory storage: free forever, no limits.
Credits: 500/month free. No credit card required.

## Links
- Consumer app: https://remlabs.ai
- Developer API: https://slopshop.gg
- Dashboard: https://remlabs.ai/brain
- Pricing: https://remlabs.ai/pricing
